_description: Supported display currencies and their exchange rates relative to USD. All internal prices are stored in USD; conversion happens at display time only. rateFromUsd is the multiplier applied to convert a USD amount into this currency. locale is a BCP 47 language tag used by Intl.NumberFormat. To add a new currency, append an object with a unique code, its locale, and its rateFromUsd. Update rates periodically to reflect current exchange values.
